title: Bedsure Sherpa Fleece Throw Blanket - Fluffy Microfiber Solid Blankets for Bed and Couch Double/Twin Size, Silver Grey, 150x200cm
features: Reversible Softness: Designed with 220 GSM velvety flannel on the top and 260 GSM extremely soft Sherpa on the reverse side, this double-sided cosy blanket is perfect by itself or as an extra layer on cold nights, offering the utmost comfort all year round.
Thick & Warm: The Bedsure Sherpa Fleece Blanket maintains the ideal balance between weight and warmth. Enjoy being cuddled up by this soft and calming blanket whenever you're ready to snuggle up.

Versatile: This double blanket is the perfect accessory for your family and pets to get cosy—whether used as an addition to your dorm room, as a warm companion when you relax or take a nap in the recliner, or as a home decor element that coordinates with your couch.

Giftable: Available in multiple sizes and colors, this Sherpa blanket also comes in a festive gift-ready package, making this ultra-soft blanket perfect for your loved ones or as a surgery recovery gift.

Enhanced Durability: Made with unmatched quality, this soft blanket features neat stitching that ensures a more robust connection at the seams for improved durability. Guaranteed to resist fading and shedding.

Easy to Care: This Standard 100 by OEKO-TEX(24.HCN.19195) certified blanket can be machine washed between 30°C to 60°C, for the best result, wash it at 40°C if possible, and tumble dry low to keep the blanket soft after washes.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page IDEAL GIFT This blanket is perfect for gifting a loved one or sprucing up your home, merging practicality and style. SOFT & FLUFFY Featuring velvety flannel and ultra-soft Sherpa, this blanket delivers a winning combo of softness and warmth. THICK & REVERSIBLE This reversible blanket is thick but not overly heavy, keeping you warm on chilly nights.
